allow: PowerShell(cd "d:\\ClaudeApps\\mundial2026"; Start-Process -FilePath "npm" -ArgumentList "run","dev" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001" -TimeoutSec 4 -UseBasicParsing; "OK $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -TimeoutSec 4 -UseBasicParsing; "OK port 3000: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Server not ready yet: $_" } })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001" -TimeoutSec 4 -UseBasicParsing; "OK port 3001: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -TimeoutSec 4 -UseBasicParsing; "OK port 3000: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Not ready: $_" } })
